---
name: Feature request
about: An idea to make the dashboard better
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What you would like the tool to do.

**The problem it solves**
What is awkward or missing today.

**Notes**
Anything about scope, German vs general applicability, or how it should behave in both languages.
Remember the app stays a single dependency-free offline file.
